title: Hakuba Appears
description: Pages 6–10 focus on hakuba appears, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Gladius, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as rebecca struggles through D Block as Cavendish, the crowd, and unseen forces turn the Colosseum match into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Damn that Rebecca!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: She's as tough as ever!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hurry up and die, little girl!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What Happened !?

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: The screen exploded!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Mr. Horse!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Please take me to the Royal Palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why does he weep....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hey how do you that's Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And how do you know my name!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: B.... B... BECUB I'BE BEENYERPAN DIS WHOLE TIDE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: (Because I've been your fan this whole time!!)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This guy doesn't seem that good at talking...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: W...won't you give me an auto- graph!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: If I go and search for Luffy-Renpal, would you give me an auto- graph?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: ....? you'll find him for us!? Yes, please!! And: hurry up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Just wait right there!! I'll find him for you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Even if it costs me my life!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: your life, huh...\\

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: It's the white-hot d-block.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Contes- tants are being elimi- nated in droves!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I have been

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Uwah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: OHH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: You!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Guahh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Owah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: PUNT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: DAMMMN!! She sure is TENA- Cious!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Rebecca's specialty, the "Last stand swo- RDS dance"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: with her back to the outer moat, filled with fighting fish...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Her surprising speed allows her to use her oppo- Nents' own power to drop them into the drink!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Yes!! In every match she's been in...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: ...she's never once wounded anyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Prisoner Gladiator lodging.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: And no one has even once landed a blow on her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: So I guess she can use color of observe- Tion Haki!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: She's beat them all via ring-outs.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Hak!?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: She's "The Undefeated Woman"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Not bad at all! Do your best, Rebecca!!!

summary: Hakuba Appears focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Gladius, Unknown person #5 as rebecca struggles through D Block as Cavendish, the crowd, and unseen forces turn the Colosseum match into chaos.
